content.query:
SELECT
--srsmap.ChannelName as [ChannelName]
--,prdmap.CampaignProduct as [CampaignProduct]
case when in1.DateReceived is null then 'Call' else 'Form' end as CallOrForm
,srs.SourceCode as [LeadSource]
,srs.LeadSubSource as [LeadSubSource]
,srs.LeadSubSourceID as [LeadSubSourceID]
,lds.Division as [Division]
,lds.LeadID as [LeadID]
,cst.CustomerID as [CustomerID]
,in1.DateReceived
,in1.CheckoutDate
,lds.DateEntered as [DateEntered]
,lds.EntryDate as [EntryDate]
,cst.FirstName as [FirstName]
,cst.LastName as [LastName]
,cst.Address1 as [Address1]
,cst.Address2 as [Address2]
,cst.City as [City]
,cst.State as [State]
,cst.Zip as [Zip]
,cst.Phone as [Phone]
,cst.Email as [Email]
,prd.ProductName as [Product]
,prd.LongDescription as [ProductDescription]
,brn.LongName as [Market]
,dsp.DispositionID as [DispositionID]
,dsp.Comments as [Disposition]
,lds.ApptSet as [ApptSet]
,appt.SetDate as [AppointmentSetDate]
,appt.[ApptDate] as [AppointmentDate]
,lds.NetIssued as [NetIssued]
,lds.Sat as [Sat]
,lds.Sold as [Sold]
,case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as [NetSalesAmount]
,job.GrossAmount as [GrossSalesAmount]
,job.JobID as [JobID]
,jbs.JobStatus as [JobStatus]
,jsc.JobStatusCategory as [JobStatusCategory]
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,lds.[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_RegressionRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue]
,'' as GCLID
,'' as UTMAccount
,'' as UTMMedium
,in1.Source as UTMSource
,in1.Sender as UTMCampaign
,'' as UTMContent
,'' as UTMTerm
,'' as PropertyType
,'No' as LeadDeleted
,'' as LeadDeletedReason
,lds.[SetBy_EmployeeID]
,emp.[FirstName] + ' '+ emp.[LastName] as SetBy_EmployeeName
,emp.[Email] as  SetBy_Email
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
--inner join [RDM].[PERF_MKTNG_SRS_MAPPING] srsmap
--on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srsmap.LeadSubSourceID
left join EDW.FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG in1
on lds.LeadID = in1.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [RDM].[PERF_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_PRODUCTS_MAPPING] prdmap
on prd.ProductName = prdmap.ProductID
and prd.Division = prdmap.Division
left join [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join (
    SELECT 
        [LeadID]
        ,MAX([ApptDate]) as [ApptDate]
        ,MAX(SetDate) as [SetDate]
    FROM 
        [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT]
    group by 
    LeadID
) appt
on lds.LeadID = appt.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
left join [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
on lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
left join [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
on job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
on jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
left join [EDW].[DIM_EMPLOYEE] emp
on lds.[SetBy_EmployeeID] = emp.[EmployeeID]
WHERE
lds.Division = 'SWR'
and lds.EntryDate >= '2023-01-01'
